Lakers Clinch Top-6 Western Conference Seed and Playoff Spot with 127-113 Win Over Cavaliers | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Cleveland Cavaliers 127-113 on March 31, 2026, clinching a top-six seed in the Western Conference playoffs and guaranteeing no lower than the #6 spot, with momentum toward the #3 seed (magic number of 3-4 wins).[1][2][3][5]
